text:
Once upon a time in a tiny cottage in the woods, there was a cat named Mittens. Mittens loved to hunt at night, stalking mice with her sharp ears and swift paws.

One full moonlit night, Mittens discovered something extraordinary. Beneath a large oak tree, she discovered an ancient wooden chest. Inside, she found treasures — old brooches, peculiar beads, faded maps. Something felt strangely right about those relics, like they were waiting for her.

Curious, Mittens decided to visit the forest daily, hoping to find more treasures like this. Her tales grew until every villager knew of the fabled cat who discovered relics.

One village elder suggested that perhaps Mittens wasn't really a cat at all, but a mystical creature. The villagers listened eagerly, imagining her as a guardian spirit. Mittens was flattered by the praise.

One night, after moonlit prowls and treasure-hunting, Mittens stumbled upon a hidden courtyard — a garden unlike
